titel: The European Central Bank (ECB) has published preliminary schedules for its activities throughout the year 2028.
html:
June 30, 2026

The European Central Bank (ECB) today published the preliminary calendars for the Eurosystem's regular money market operations and reserve periods for 2028.

The preliminary calendar for the Eurosystem's reserve periods takes into account the Governing Council schedule for 2028, as well as the calendar for the regular money market operations.

The preliminary calendar for the Eurosystem's regular money market operations includes only main refinancing operations (MRO) and three-month longer-term refinancing operations (LTRO). It does not include any additional or ad hoc operations that may be carried out during 2028.

Preliminary Calendar for Reserve Periods in 2028 (including reserve period 8 in 2027)

Reserve Period (RP) | Relevant Governing Council Meeting | Start of RP | End of RP | Reporting Basis (Monthly) | Reporting Basis (Quarterly) | Length of RP (days) ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- 8/2027 | Thursday, December 16, 2027 | Wednesday, December 22, 2027 | Tuesday, February 8, 2028 | October 2027 | September 2027 | 49 1 | Thursday, February 3, 2028 | Wednesday, February 9, 2028 | Tuesday, March 28, 2028 | December 2027 | September 2027 | 49 2 | Thursday, March 23, 2028 | Wednesday, March 29, 2028 | Tuesday, May 9, 2028 | January 2028 | December 2027 | 42 3 | Thursday, May 4, 2028 | Wednesday, May 10, 2028 | Tuesday, June 13, 2028 | March 2028 | December 2027 | 35 4 | Thursday, June 8, 2028 | Wednesday, June 14, 2028 | Tuesday, July 25, 2028 | April 2028 | March 2028 | 42 5 | Thursday, July 20, 2028 | Wednesday, July 26, 2028 | Tuesday, September 12, 2028 | May 2028 | March 2028 | 49 6 | Thursday, September 7, 2028 | Wednesday, September 13, 2028 | Tuesday, October 17, 2028 | July 2028 | June 2028 | 35 7 | Thursday, October 12, 2028 | Wednesday, October 18, 2028 | Tuesday, December 12, 2028 | August 2028 | June 2028 | 56 8 | Thursday, December 7, 2028 | Wednesday, December 13, 2028 | To be determined (tbd) | October 2028 | September 2028 | To be determined (tbd)

For media inquiries, please contact Clara Martín Marqués at tel.: +49 69 1344 17919.

tldr: The European Central Bank has released a preliminary draft of its timeline for how it plans to manage loans and money in the market during the year 2028.
lattlast:
The European Central Bank, the institution responsible for the economy in many European countries, has published a preliminary calendar for the year 2028. This schedule outlines when they will conduct their regular financial operations in the market and how they plan to lend money to other banks.

The plan includes specific timeframes for various types of loans, such as short-term and long-term options. Because it is a preliminary calendar, it represents an initial draft that indicates the fixed times for these activities during 2028.

This information is important for banks and other financial institutions because it provides insight into when they can expect certain types of transactions to occur. Currently, the plan only includes regular operations and does not include any additional or special events that may arise later.
